campaign_title: Own the First 10 Seconds. Control the Last 30 Seconds.

weeks.goal: Make the required greeting automatic, clear, warm, and consistent.

daily_topics.title: The Greeting Is the Standard
daily_topics.behavior: Use the required greeting exactly at the start of every call.

daily_topics.title: Say It Clearly
daily_topics.behavior: Slow down, speak clearly, and make the full greeting easy to understand.

daily_topics.title: Your Name Matters
daily_topics.behavior: Give your name clearly and confidently as part of the required greeting.

daily_topics.title: Get and Use the Customer’s Name
daily_topics.behavior: Ask who you are speaking with and naturally use the customer's name during the call.

daily_topics.title: Greeting Audit
daily_topics.behavior: Review whether every call followed the required greeting and sounded professional.

weeks.goal: Train the team to slow down, listen fully, ask better questions, and understand the customer’s real concern before recommending the next step.

daily_topics.title: Let the Customer Finish
daily_topics.behavior: Do not interrupt the customer; pause before responding.

daily_topics.title: Ask Better Questions
daily_topics.behavior: Ask at least two clarifying questions before recommending the next step.

daily_topics.title: Paraphrase the Concern
daily_topics.behavior: Repeat the customer's concern back before moving to appointment or inspection.

daily_topics.title: Listen for the Real Need
daily_topics.behavior: Identify what the customer is really worried about, not just the words they said.

daily_topics.title: Patience Wins Trust
daily_topics.behavior: Slow down, listen fully, and make the customer feel heard before making them feel scheduled.

weeks.theme: Clarity, Warmth, and Strong Call Closure
weeks.goal: Improve communication by making advisors warmer, clearer, more concise, and stronger at closing calls with confirmed next steps.

daily_topics.title: Warmth Is Not Optional
daily_topics.behavior: Make every customer feel welcomed, not processed.

daily_topics.title: Replace Weak Words
daily_topics.behavior: Replace uncertain language with confident guidance.

daily_topics.title: Confirm the Next Step
daily_topics.behavior: Confirm appointment time, concern, next action, and best contact number.

daily_topics.title: Finish With Confidence
daily_topics.behavior: End with gratitude, certainty, and a clear plan.

scorecard: Used a warm and professional tone
Let the customer finish without interrupting
Communicated clearly without rambling or repeating
Confirmed the next step or appointment
